args.comment: auth-api v5.8.4 and session-store v2.2.9 confirmed live; patching-complete email sent.

args.text: Credential rotation checklist completed: active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body: As part of remediating CVE-2026-30117, we've patched auth-api and session-store and rotated credentials/signing keys. All staff sessions have been invalidated as a precaution — please sign in again. No action needed beyond that.

args.comment: Credentials rotated, staff notified, register updated. Remediation complete.
